---
id: play-se
title: "Play a sound effect"

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Play a sound effect"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/audio/se"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Play a one-shot sound effect from the specified mod asset with optional volume, speed, and panning controls.
